scope: Run the full 515-domain portfolio under an interactive harness after the runtime fixes, then save the packet and readout with explicit caveats

decision_context.prior_state: The default portfolio harness and the first interactive attempts were still too expensive to finish in-session, even after making bootstrap resamples configurable.
decision_context.decision: Use the optimized runtime path with a much smaller interactive harness to complete a full-universe packet and readout today, while recording that the thinner harness is only a checkpoint and not a full-fidelity ranking artifact.
decision_context.why_now: The main immediate goal was to prove the repo-local 515-domain path can complete on the full universe after the runtime fixes, rather than to claim that the thin harness is an authoritative final ranking.

files_expected.purpose: Stores the completed interactive full-universe portfolio packet.
Stores the readout derived from the completed interactive full-universe portfolio packet.
Explains the harness settings, what completed, and why the resulting absolute adoption read is not yet trustworthy.
Captures the execution choice and limitations for the interactive portfolio checkpoint.

planned_steps: Run the full 515-domain universe with an explicitly interactive harness
Save the portfolio packet under research/meta
Build the readout packet from the saved portfolio run
Write the limitation note so the checkpoint is not mistaken for a full-fidelity ranking

expected_checks: The full 515-domain packet completes and is saved under research/meta
The readout packet completes and references the saved portfolio run
The limitation note records that the thin harness collapses absolute adoption and should not be treated as the final trusted ranking

guardrails: Do not present the interactive harness output as a full-fidelity portfolio verdict
Do not change benchmark membership from this checkpoint
Treat this batch as execution proof plus a coarse rank skeleton, not the final portfolio readout
